subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, the friends in Bombay are firm and steadfast, and are treading [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید الحمد لله احبای بمبای ثابت و مستقیم و سالک بر
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @firmness in the Covenant
